# Subby

> Local-first desktop subscription tracker built with Tauri 2, React 19, and SQLite.

Subby helps users track recurring subscriptions with a glassmorphic UI, payment calendar, and spending analytics.

## Documentation

- [README](./README.md): User guide, installation, features
- [CLAUDE.md](./CLAUDE.md): AI assistant context
- [Architecture](./docs/reference/architecture.md): System design, tech stack, data flow

## Source Code

### Core Application
- [src/App.tsx](./src/App.tsx): Main app entry, routing, lazy loading
- [src/pages/](./src/pages/): Page components (dashboard, subscriptions, calendar, settings)
- [src/components/](./src/components/): React components organized by feature

### State Management
- [src/stores/subscription-store.ts](./src/stores/subscription-store.ts): Zustand store for subscriptions
- [src/stores/category-store.ts](./src/stores/category-store.ts): Category management
- [src/stores/settings-store.ts](./src/stores/settings-store.ts): User preferences

### Data Layer
- [src/lib/database.ts](./src/lib/database.ts): SQLite database operations
- [src/lib/currency.ts](./src/lib/currency.ts): Currency formatting (10 currencies)
- [src/lib/date-utils.ts](./src/lib/date-utils.ts): Date calculations, payment scheduling
- [src/types/](./src/types/): Zod schemas and TypeScript types

### Backend (Tauri)
- [src-tauri/src/main.rs](./src-tauri/src/main.rs): Rust backend entry
- [src-tauri/tauri.conf.json](./src-tauri/tauri.conf.json): Tauri configuration
- [migrations/](./src-tauri/migrations/): SQLite schema migrations

## Key Concepts

- **Billing Cycles**: weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly
- **Categories**: 9 defaults + custom, each with icon and color
- **Payments**: Track paid/skipped status per billing period
- **Themes**: Dark/light/system with CSS variables
- **Data Export**: JSON backup/restore via native file dialogs

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|------------|
| Runtime | Tauri 2.x (Rust) |
| Frontend | React 19 + TypeScript + Vite 7 |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS 4 + shadcn/ui |
| State | Zustand |
| Database | SQLite (tauri-plugin-sql) |
| Forms | React Hook Form + Zod |

## Commands

```bash
pnpm tauri dev      # Development
pnpm tauri build    # Production build
pnpm test           # Run tests
pnpm lint           # ESLint
```
